layout.betaCta: MVP: control your dynamic screens simply and quickly.

login.title: Sign in

dashboard.noWidgets: No widgets displayed. Click "Add widget" to get started.

settings.title: Settings

settings.deleteInstanceDesc: Permanently delete this instance and all its data
settings.deleteConfirmDesc: This action is irreversible. All screens, folders, and accounts will be permanently deleted.
settings.deleteConfirmHostnameLabel: Type the address of your instance to confirm:

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Manage your subscription and payments.

help.subtitle: Documentation and tutorials.
help.title: Help
help.placeholder: An interactive tutorial will be available here.
help.aboutDesc: Flowboard is a SaaS platform for managing dynamic screen slideshows. Create folders, screens, and media playlists, then display them on any screen. Manage multiple user accounts with granular folder and screen permissions.
help.tutorialDesc: Discover the main features of Flowboard in a few guided steps. You can relaunch this tutorial at any time from this page.

tutorial.step1Desc: Let us guide you through the main features in a few steps. Click Next to continue.
tutorial.step2Desc: Your workspace at a glance. Widgets give you key statistics — add, remove, and rearrange them freely.
tutorial.step3Desc: Create folders and screens, then add your images, videos, and GIFs to build your slideshows.
tutorial.step4Desc: Create user accounts and assign granular access to specific folders and screens.
tutorial.step5Desc: Change the interface language, switch theme, or sign out of your session.
tutorial.step6Desc: Click here to add or remove widgets and personalise your dashboard view.
tutorial.step7Desc: Explore Flowboard at your own pace. You can relaunch this tutorial from the Help tab at any time.
